what: Hero CTA links to /forge and /battle instead of scrolling to lore sections
why: Homepage had zero links to game actions; new player had no CTA to start playing

what: Strip emojis with text-only cleanup (no SVG injection into 4329 lines)
why: 4329 emoji lines across 152 files — injecting SVG spans would bloat HTML 3-5x and break text nodes in translations. Stripping is clean, reversible, and NW_ICONS handles the few UI icons that need S...

what: v5 regex uses only single-char trailing space removal after emoji, no multi-char cleanup patterns
why: v3/v4 used aggressive post-strip patterns that matched HTML attributes. v5 only removes emoji+optional-trailing-space. Safe for all HTML contexts.

what: Auto-compact in pre-commit hook when memory.json > 200KB
why: 975KB memory.json with 9196 dead coChange pairs from deleted files. Without auto-compact, every commit grows the file with stale data. 200KB limit keeps it under control permanently.

what: Filter archive/, .husky/, dist/, memory.json from query display and pattern tracking
why: These paths are noise — archive is old, .husky changes are config, dist is generated. Showing them in hotspots/coChanges wastes context window for AI sessions.

what: Strip [ZH]/[TH] placeholder prefixes instead of adding real translations
why: 3792 placeholders across 69 pages. Real translation of all strings is a massive effort. Stripping prefixes shows English as fallback, which is functional. Real zh/th translations can be added incre...

what: Rewrite sentinel i18n module to check [ZH]/[TH] placeholders, missing keys, and dual i18n systems
why: Old module said 83/B+ when 3792 strings were untranslated. New module correctly shows 15/F. Sentinel must tell the truth.

what: Move snapshot from pre-commit to post-commit hook
why: Pre-commit runs BEFORE commit exists, so git rev-parse HEAD returns the previous commit hash. Post-commit has the real hash. memory.json is staged by the next commit's pre-commit hook — always one ...

what: Pre-commit: auto-compact + stage memory.json only. Post-commit: full snapshot.
why: Separation of concerns. Pre-commit is for preparation (clean/stage). Post-commit is for recording (snapshot). No infinite loops, no race conditions.

what: Hearthstone-style contextual coach for first battle — just-in-time tooltips, not upfront reading
why: Research: Hearthstone scripted tutorial limits actions to correct ones + shows one concept per battle. Marvel Snap first-time UX review highlights contextual hints. ACM CHI 2022 paper on 'just-in-t...

what: Coach is a separate file (nw-battle-coach.js) — does not touch nw-battle-v7.js
why: Battle v7 has 5 fix chains in recent history. Touching it risks breakage. Coach uses MutationObservers and event listeners to detect game state without modifying battle code. If coach breaks, battl...

what: Smart Glow + Auto-Target + Auto-Play as separate file nw-battle-assist.js
why: Keeps battle engine untouched; coach pattern proven; reads via NW_BATTLE API; skips visuals when coach is active

what: Attacker scoring: scoreAttacker() picks best board card to attack with; shows ATK tag on board
why: Reduces decision paralysis — player just taps the green-glowing card

what: Use the conversation AI as the LLM-as-Judge instead of an external API
why: No free LLM API available. The AI assistant already running in the conversation IS the judge — it reads .nw-context, self-evaluates before committing, and records learnings. Pre-commit hook does de...

what: Blueprint concepts adapted for no-API environment
why: From the Recursive Self-Improvement blueprint: 1) Commit scoring (deterministic, 0-100) replaces rubric-based LLM scoring. 2) Auto-reflection on fix chains replaces LLM critique. 3) Semantic distil...

what: NumbahWan as primary font everywhere on homepage
why: User wants the custom pixel font to be THE identity of the site, not just headings — Orbitron is fallback only

what: Built /oracle page as a life-advice generator combining Buddhist sutras, Tao Te Ching, Bible, and Quran with humor — fallback pool of 20 deep wisdoms so it works even without LLM API
why: User wants an addictive wisdom page that feels like a premium product. Fallback pool makes it usable immediately without waiting for API key to be configured on Cloudflare.

what: Oracle page uses keyword-matched curated wisdom pool (20 entries across 15 life topics) as primary content source, with LLM as enhancement when API key is valid
why: API tokens expire between sessions — curated pool must be rich enough to stand alone as the full product. Each wisdom follows the 5-part Oracle format: empathy, consensus, funny truth, action step,...

what: Enriched deepReflect with 6 organic analysis types: decision-impact correlation, unprotected area detection, recurring theme analysis, velocity/sprint quality, score trend analysis, focus shift detect
why: Learnings and reflections arrays were empty or contained only template fix-chain messages. The system had rich data (32 decisions, 12 breakages, 101 snapshots) but wasn't synthesizing cross-cutting...

what: viral-ready README + tools page + CONTRIBUTING + issue templates
why: GitHub repos that go viral have: badges, copy-paste commands, visual terminal demos, contributor CTA, issue templates
